Universal Monster Rules
Elemental
Source
Alien Archive pg. 46
An elemental is a creature native to one of the four Elemental Planes that is composed entirely of that plane’s element. They are usually encountered alone or in groups of 2 to 8. The statistics for an elemental can be generated using one of the stat blocks below plus one of the grafts at the bottom.
